claims.text: What is claimed is: 1. A regimen for the treatment of pain which comprises administering to one in need thereof about 25 mg of tramadol on days 1-3; about 50 mg of tramadol on days 4-6; about 75 mg of...

use_codes.desc: A TITRATION DOSING REGIMEN FOR THE TREATMENT OF PAIN USING AN INITIAL DOSE OF ABOUT 25MG

indications.text: ULTRAM is indicated for the management of moderate to moderately severe pain in adults.

ULTRAM is indicated for the management of pain in adults that is severe enough to
require an opioid analgesic and for which alternative treatments are inadequate.
Limitations of Use
Because of the risks of addiction, abuse, and misuse with opioids, even at recommended

ULTRAM is indicated in adults for the management of pain severe enough to require an opioid
analgesic and for which alternative treatments are inadequate.
Limitations of Use
